origin_model.name: The Veilflare Emergence
origin_model.description: Reality began when an unknown cosmic phenomenon called the Veilflare condensed possibility into three coupled strata: the Material Expanse, the Resonant Lattice, and the Deep Interval.
creation_dynamics: The Material Expanse carries matter-like states and conventional causality windows.
The Resonant Lattice stores pattern-memory and probability tension.
The Deep Interval acts as a null-pressure sink that stabilizes both upper strata.

reality_layers.name: Material Expanse
properties: Mass-phase structures form stars, oceans, and solid bodies.
Time flows in directional streams that can braid but never reverse locally.
Chemical-like complexity emerges from charge-vectored bonds.

reality_layers.name: Resonant Lattice
properties: Information-bearing field where intentions, histories, and quantum-like states interfere.
Acts as a medium for long-range synchronization and consciousness coupling.
Can be engineered through harmonic machines.

reality_layers.name: Deep Interval
properties: Sparse layer of near-zero event density.
Absorbs excess entropy-equivalent pressure from other layers.
Transit through it is possible only via interval folding and exact phase locks.

energy_source.behavior: Appears as non-local surges that increase coherence between layers; extractable indirectly as flux gradients rather than as a fuel.
constraints: Direct containment collapses the extraction apparatus.
Veilflare intensity follows cyclical harmonics tied to galactic-scale resonance basins.
Overuse in one region triggers compensatory dampening nearby.

fundamental_forces.name: Cohesion
fundamental_forces.role: Binds mass-phase particles into stable structures.
fundamental_forces.notes: Strength increases in high-density lattice zones.

fundamental_forces.name: Vector Drift
fundamental_forces.role: Controls motion, inertia-like persistence, and orbital patterning.
fundamental_forces.notes: Sets local speed ceilings based on ambient resonance pressure.

fundamental_forces.name: Lumen Exchange
fundamental_forces.role: Mediates radiation, thermal transfer, and signal propagation.
fundamental_forces.notes: Permits superluminal signaling only through pre-entangled lattice channels.

fundamental_forces.name: Resonance Coupling
fundamental_forces.role: Links physical states with information patterns in the Resonant Lattice.
fundamental_forces.notes: Enables memory fields, predictive modeling, and consciousness-transfer artifacts.

fundamental_forces.name: Null Shear
fundamental_forces.role: Draws disorder pressure into the Deep Interval, preventing runaway chaos.
fundamental_forces.notes: Failure of Null Shear regionally causes anomaly blooms.

civilizations.name: The Auric Spiral Clans
civilizations.origin_environment: Helical megastorm belts around a bright gas giant
civilizations.biocognitive_profile: Distributed neural colonies inhabiting bio-mineral flotillas

evolutionary_path.driver: Adaptation to rapidly shifting electromagnetic weather
milestones: Development of resonance weather forecasting via living sensors
Construction of floating city-rings synchronized to storm cycles

post_industrial_state.industry: Self-healing bioforges grown from mineral spores

civilizations.name: The Basalt Archive Directorate
civilizations.origin_environment: Subsurface crystal caverns on tectonically active worlds
civilizations.biocognitive_profile: Silicate-bodied entities with phase-encoded memory cores
civilizations.societal_structure: Merit-chronicles ranked by depth and fidelity of recorded knowledge

evolutionary_path.driver: Survival through geological catastrophes and data preservation
milestones: Transition from oral memory to crystalline total archives

post_industrial_state.energy: Geothermal resonance taps coupled to lattice condensers
post_industrial_state.industry: Matter-printing from silicate feedstock and pattern libraries
post_industrial_state.mobility: Deep-bore interval elevators and phased tunnelways
post_industrial_state.governance_technology: Algorithmic jurisprudence audited by living historians

civilizations.name: The Pelagic Continuum
civilizations.home_layer: Material Expanse with Deep Interval access
civilizations.origin_environment: Abyssal ocean planets with bioluminescent trench networks
civilizations.biocognitive_profile: Amphibious swarms linked by electrosonic cognition
civilizations.societal_structure: Seasonal federations formed around migratory knowledge currents

evolutionary_path.driver: Predator pressure and resource variability across depth bands
milestones: Controlled dives into micro-interval pockets for resource extraction

post_industrial_state.mobility: Current-riding arc fleets and interval bubble gates
post_industrial_state.governance_technology: Fluid constitutions recalibrated each migration epoch

stages.description: Civilizations develop automation, extraction systems, and macro-scale infrastructure.
Planetary communication webs and synthetic cognition accelerate science and governance.
Practical manipulation of the Resonant Lattice enables predictive systems and non-local coordination.
Stable travel between cosmological layers through phase-lock and interval folding technologies.
Civilizations shift from energy extraction to harmonic balancing to avoid regional collapse and anomaly proliferation.

cross_civilization_differences: Spiral Clans prioritize adaptive bioengineering and meteorological control.
Archive Directorate prioritizes information permanence and lithic computation.
Pelagic Continuum prioritizes ecological integration and distributed swarm cognition.

anomalies.name: Mirror Bloom
anomalies.description: Localized duplication of possible presents, creating parallel outcome pockets that eventually recombine.
anomalies.containment: Tri-layer phase anchors and decision dampening fields

anomalies.name: Hollow Choir
anomalies.description: Self-amplifying signal pattern in the Resonant Lattice that overwrites consensus systems with recursive directives.
anomalies.containment: Isolated lattice quarantine shells and mnemonic firebreak protocols

anomalies.name: Interval Glass
anomalies.description: Deep Interval regions harden into impassable geometry, trapping transit corridors and distorting nearby force behavior.
trigger_conditions: Sustained entropy dumping beyond local tolerance
anomalies.containment: Route cycling, entropy budgeting, and controlled Null Shear venting
